title: Mottugale Mottugale Lyrics Roja Koottam
stanzas:
Mottugale mottugale
moochu vidaa mottugale
kanmaniyaa thoongugiraal
kaalayil malarungal

pon arumbugal malargayile
men melliya saptham varum
en kadhali
thuyil kalaindhaal
en idhayam thaangaadhu ..

Mottugale mottugale
moochu vidaa mottugale
kadhalan thoongugiraal
kaalayil malarungal

pon arumbugal malargayile
men melliya saptham varum
en kadhalan
thuyil kalaindhaal
en idhayam thaangaadhu ..

unveettu thottam kandu
iravil vandhu saerven
rojakkalai vittu vittu
mutkal thirudi poven

nee aagattum endru sollidvu
un sattayil poovaai
poopen.

Mottugale mottugale
moochu vidaa mottugale
kanmaniyaa thoongugiraal
kaalayil malarungal

pon arumbugal malargayile
men melliya saptham varum
en kadhali
thuyil kalaindhaal
en idhayam thaangaadhu ..

kadhali moochu vidum
kaattrayum segarippen
kadhali micham vaikkum
thaeneer theertham enbaen

kadarkarai manalil namadhu
pergal ezhudhi paarpen.
alai vandhu alli sella
kadali kolla paarpaen.

un netriyil vervai
kandavudan naan
veyilai vetta paarppaen

Mottugale mottugale
moochu vidaa mottugale
kadhalan thoongugiraal
kaalayil malarungal

pon arumbugal malargayile
men melliya saptham varum
en kadhalan
thuyil kalaindhaal
en idhayam thaangaadhu ..

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song Mottugale Mottugale expresses deep romantic feelings, portraying the beauty of love and longing.

What is the plot context of the song in the movie?

In Roja Koottam, this song highlights the romantic moments between the lead characters, enhancing the emotional depth of their relationship.

Who are the singers and music director of the song?

The song features the talented voices of Hariharan and Sadhana Sargam, with music composed by Bharadwaj.

When was the song released?

Mottugale Mottugale was released on February 14, 2002, coinciding with Valentine's Day.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Mottugale Mottugale, the romantic essence of love is beautifully captured through the soulful voices of Hariharan and Sadhana Sargam. The song plays a pivotal role in Roja Koottam, enhancing the emotional connection between the characters. With its soothing melody and heartfelt lyrics, it evokes feelings of longing and affection. This timeless classic continues to resonate with lovers, making it a perfect choice for romantic occasions.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Mottugale Mottugale from Roja Koottam is a mesmerizing duet that beautifully captures the essence of romance. With the enchanting voices of Hariharan and Sadhana Sargam, this song is a perfect blend of heartfelt lyrics and melodious composition by Bharadwaj. Experience the magic of love through this timeless classic that resonates with every romantic soul.
stanzaMeanings: Words, words, don't let go, words, my dear, are sleeping in the night, flowers bloom.
Golden dreams in the flower garden, a sweet promise comes, when my beloved sleeps, my heart cannot bear it.
Words, words, don't let go, words, the lover is sleeping, flowers bloom in the night.
Golden dreams in the flower garden, a sweet promise comes, when my lover sleeps, my heart cannot bear it.
If you give me a flower, I will wrap it in a scarf.
I keep the beautiful flowers in a bank locker.
Seeing your garden, I will come in the night and steal the roses.
When you say you will be mine, I will bloom like a flower in your presence.
Words, words, don't let go, words, my dear, are sleeping in the night, flowers bloom.
Golden dreams in the flower garden, a sweet promise comes, when my beloved sleeps, my heart cannot bear it.
I will embrace the breeze that my beloved lets go, I will say that love is the sweet water that flows.
I will write our names in the sand of the shore. I will watch the waves come and go, taking the love away.
When I see your eyes, I will look for the stars in the sky.
Words, words, don't let go, words, the lover is sleeping, flowers bloom in the night.
Golden dreams in the flower garden, a sweet promise comes, when my lover sleeps, my heart cannot bear it.
